metadata.description: anchored — the verification gate for AI work. The AI works like it always does; an independent validator must prove every criterion at the gates. Nothing reaches done without evidence.

plugins.name: a
plugins.description: Verification gate for AI work — one run file, one validator, evidence-gated close. CLI-only transport via the `anchored` binary over Bash, no MCP. Slash commands: /a:run /a:setup.
